website like notion personally i write down to-do lists every single day this is so that i can write something down and my brain doesn't overflow because i just know if i don't wear something down it's just floating around in my head and eventually i'm just gonna forget about it but if i write it down and i can like visually see it then i can be like oh before my day ends like i need to get that task done so for example every single night before a new day begins i always make a to-do list for the next day just planning out what i need to do and like all the tasks that i need to get done like i said visually it just helps me and also it's just fun like checking off all the boxes throughout the day like getting your stuff done it feels good but overall just having good time management is just so important especially being in high school because the year gets busy so make sure you know what to prioritize and stick with it moving on let's talk about friends i literally got so many team as well as class counsel two things that i really enjoy and i'm really passionate about so being able to

title: GIRL TALK | highschool advice from a junior, boys, dating, & MORE!
text: because most likely these people will have common interests with you for example my freshman and sophomore year i joined the dance team as well as class counsel two things that i really enjoy and i'm really passionate about so being able to be around people that have the same passions and like the same stuff i literally have met so many new people and also like some of my closest best friends i've bonded with and gone closer because of joining these clubs and stuff so i would just suggest putting yourself out there and being open to joining new things and meeting people and another tip is literally talking to and becoming friends with the people in your classes because you're gonna see them every single day for a whole school year so might as well just get to know them and become friends with them and just to clarify i'm literally talking about like your seat partners in second period like but not only could you spark a new relationship but then also it's just nice having people in your class so that school can be a little more enjoyable and plus if you're absent sometimes you could always text them and be like yo what did i miss but biggest tip for many new people is just putting yourself out there and being open to talking and creating new friendships unfortunately i've gone through a few toxic friendships throughout middle school and high school which honestly is just something that everyone goes through i feel like but i got a lot of questions on like how to know if your friends are toxic or like how to steer away from bad ones so here are signs of some toxic friends if they overall have a more negative impact than positive impact on you if they talk bad about you or are fake around other people if they only hang out with you if they want something or something that can benefit them and if they just make you feel not good basically a good friend should be loving supportive kind um have your back this is how i like to think of it be friends with people who make you a better person whether that's they challenge you academically and make you more motivated or inspired or if they just make you a happier more positive person be friends with people who will bring you up and not down and just have your genuine interest i would say for the people who don't know if their friends are toxic like literally just analyze how they make you feel when you hang out with them like obviously if you're feeling like crap after hanging out with them like

title: GIRL TALK | highschool advice from a junior, boys, dating, & MORE!

feeling like crap after hanging out with them like if they say stuff to you or do actions that are just like not nice or not kind then maybe you need to stay away from them which brings me into how first of all i just want to say obviously don't have bad blood with anyone like i feel like it takes more energy to hate someone than love someone like it's so exhausting having hatred in your heart so i just would not recommend that so my biggest advice would be communicate with that person you know like make sure you guys are on the same page this is just an example but if you like tell them about how they make you feel and they don't change anything about it then why would you stay friends with them so from there you can just slowly distance yourself away from that person and just take them out of your life and trust me i know stuff like this is really hard i think what people need to realize in middle school and high school is that you're not gonna be friends with the same people you started with like middle school i had a whole different friend group than the people i hang out with now even freshman year i had a different group now that i'm in junior year and that's okay obviously ending friendships or moving on is a really hard process to go through but you realize that it was just meant to happen like that and you guys are just going on your separate ways and paths and that's okay because it's just a part of life and growing up but to conclude about friends i just want to say make sure you surround yourself with good people and people who make you happy life is games homecoming spirit weeks what are some other ones prom just like all the fun activities and events

it's like that for you i would say turn on do not disturb put it in a different room or like turn it off because i don't know about you guys but if i just get a snapchat notification or something while i'm doing my homework like i definitely pick up my phone and check snap i don't know why it's just a habit i guess but yeah figure out where your distraction is and eliminate it and also just think about it like if you come home from school and you're like oh man i'm so tired i don't want to do homework and you have a lot of homework you don't want to like lay around be lazy and procrastinate and then by the end of the night you're like stressed out because you have all this homework but you just want to go to bed you don't want to like fail school so think about your situation and be like okay i should probably get my homework done and last thing i want to talk about is how do you deal with negative body image i wanted to add it into this video because i feel like it's something a lot of people go through and it just sucks because i know social media definitely does not help with body image and stuff because we tend to look at other people and look at their perfect lives on social media like what they choose to post and show on their platforms and we compare ourselves to them and be like wow i wish i look like them or wow i wish i lived like them and it's just a very negative and toxic mindset that i do not recommend anyone having so first and foremost first tip would just be stop comparing yourself to others literally once you start comparing yourself to others boom insecurity starts to show because trust me i've been there i do it literally all the time i hate that i do it but we just tend to see other people and look at stuff that we don't have but in terms of body image i think just learning to love yourself just not caring about what other people think and knowing that you are made to look like how you do oh and a reminder that you are yourselves worst critic meaning that the things you think bad about yourself other people definitely do not think

title: GIRL TALK | highschool advice from a junior, boys, dating, & MORE!
text: not caring about what other people think and knowing that you are made to look like how you do oh and a reminder that you are yourselves worst critic meaning that the things you think bad about yourself other people definitely do not think that at all like you could be like i hate the way my nose looks or something like that but then there are other people that are like i wish i had your nose so a lot of it has to do with your mindset like if you just think to yourself that you are enough you are beautiful you are perfect just the way you are you will start to believe it because you have this mindset that's more positive than negative and then vice versa if you're thinking all these bad things about yourself like oh my god i'm so ugly like i hate this about myself i hate that about myself like blah blah blah like how is that gonna be beneficial for you if you just continue to think those things so i would say take care of yourself shift your mindset into a more positive one and just know that you are beautiful just the way you are and that's everything that i want to talk about in this video thank you guys for joining me for this little chat let me know if you guys want me to do more of these more frequently or maybe like q a updates i don't know it's like quick ones but if you stay till the end of the video comment this kiss emoji and yeah thank you guys so much for watching i hope you enjoyed make sure to like comment down below subscribe to my channel turn on positions and go cop some culinary self-care merch i will see you guys back with another video i love you guys so so much stay positive [Music] [Music] you
